opinion.h4: STUART ET AL. v. WILSON, ATTORNEY GENERAL OF TEXAS, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF TEXAS. No. 495. Decided January 11, 1960.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
James L. McNees, Jr. for appellants.
Will Wilson, Attorney General of Texas, and John Wildenthal, Jr. and Tom I. McFarling, Assistant Attorneys General, for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
361 U.S. 232 LEWIS v. MOORE ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NORTH CAROLINA. No. 540. Decided January 11, 1960.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Herman L. Taylor and Samuel S. Mitchell for appellant.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
